race.comment: SARTI (1) rolled a good field on debut at Tauranga, and then left his run too late when finishing quickly for second by a nose at Te Rapa just over a month ago. He has since been a late scratching, and as long as he has not missed any vital work, he will be hard to hold out. Stick with him. AVANTAGGIA (11) is bred in the purple, and she was good enough to win at Te Aroha at her second ever start, and the form from that race has been franked multiple times since. She looked in top nick at a recent trial, and she will be ready to rumble. SISTER CYNANE (13) capped off some solid form with a well-deserved win at Te Aroha 4 weeks ago. She is bred to go on with the job, and she is capable of repeating the dose. CARSOLIO (2) fought on bravely for second at Taupo 17 days ago. He is peaking at the right time, and despite copping a wide gate, he can figure in the top 3 again. VIVA GLAM (10) raced well last winter into the spring, and she will be even stronger now. Include in all top 4 combos.

favourite.name: Avantaggia
